tEn: EfficientViT: Multi-Scale Linear Attention for High-Resolution Dense Prediction
tZh: EfficientViT：用于高分辨率密集预测的多尺度线性注意力
sEn: EfficientViT achieves global receptive field and multi-scale learning with lightweight, hardware-efficient operations, outperforming prior models in speed and accuracy on high-resolution dense prediction tasks.
sZh: EfficientViT通过轻量且硬件高效的操作实现全局感受野和多尺度学习，在高分辨率密集预测任务中，其速度和精度均超越先前模型。
absEn: High-resolution dense prediction enables many appealing real-world applications, such as computational photography, autonomous driving, etc. However, the vast computational cost makes deploying state-of-the-art high-resolution dense prediction models on hardware devices difficult. This work presents EfficientViT, a new family of high-resolution vision models with novel multi-scale linear attention. Unlike prior high-resolution dense prediction models that rely on heavy softmax attention, hardware-inefficient large-kernel convolution, or complicated topology structure to obtain good performances, our multi-scale linear attention achieves the global receptive field and multi-scale learning (two desirable features for high-resolution dense prediction) with only lightweight and hardware-efficient operations. As such, EfficientViT delivers remarkable performance gains over previous state-of-the-art models with significant speedup on diverse hardware platforms, including mobile CPU, edge GPU, and cloud GPU. Without performance loss on Cityscapes, our EfficientViT provides up to 13.9$\times$ and 6.2$\times$ GPU latency reduction over SegFormer and SegNeXt, respectively. For super-resolution, EfficientViT delivers up to 6.4x speedup over Restormer while providing 0.11dB gain in PSNR. For Segment Anything, EfficientViT delivers 48.9x higher throughput on A100 GPU while achieving slightly better zero-shot instance segmentation performance on COCO.
absZh: 高分辨率密集预测支持许多有吸引力的实际应用，如计算摄影、自动驾驶等。然而，巨大的计算成本使得在硬件设备上部署最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型变得困难。本文提出了EfficientViT，一种新的高分辨率视觉模型家族，具有新颖的多尺度线性注意力。与先前依赖繁重的softmax注意力、硬件低效的大核卷积或复杂拓扑结构以获得良好性能的高分辨率密集预测模型不同，我们的多尺度线性注意力仅使用轻量且硬件高效的操作即可实现全局感受野和多尺度学习（高分辨率密集预测的两个理想特性）。因此，EfficientViT在多种硬件平台（包括移动CPU、边缘GPU和云GPU）上，相比先前最先进的模型取得了显著的性能提升和大幅加速。在Cityscapes上无性能损失的情况下，我们的EfficientViT相比SegFormer和SegNeXt分别提供了高达13.9倍和6.2倍的GPU延迟降低。对于超分辨率，EfficientViT相比Restormer提供了高达6.4倍的加速，同时PSNR提高了0.11dB。对于Segment Anything，EfficientViT在A100 GPU上提供了48.9倍的吞吐量提升，同时在COCO上实现了略优的零样本实例分割性能。

contrib.en: Proposes multi-scale linear attention achieving global receptive field and multi-scale learning with hardware-efficient operations.
contrib.zh: 提出多尺度线性注意力机制，以硬件高效操作实现全局感受野和多尺度学习。

contrib.en: First to demonstrate effectiveness of linear attention for high-resolution dense prediction.
contrib.zh: 首次证明线性注意力在高分辨率密集预测中的有效性。

contrib.en: Designs EfficientViT model family with significant speedup on diverse hardware platforms.
contrib.zh: 设计EfficientViT模型系列，在多种硬件平台上实现显著加速。

contrib.en: Achieves up to 13.9x GPU latency reduction on Cityscapes over SegFormer without performance loss.
contrib.zh: 在Cityscapes上相比SegFormer实现高达13.9倍GPU延迟降低，且无性能损失。

contrib.en: Delivers 48.9x higher throughput on A100 GPU for Segment Anything with better zero-shot instance segmentation.
contrib.zh: 在Segment Anything任务中，A100 GPU吞吐量提升48.9倍，零样本实例分割性能更优。

contrib.en: Provides up to 6.4x speedup over Restormer for super-resolution with 0.11dB PSNR gain.
contrib.zh: 超分辨率任务相比Restormer实现高达6.4倍加速，PSNR提升0.11dB。

limits.en: Multi-scale linear attention may have limited capacity for local information compared to softmax attention.
limits.zh: 与softmax注意力相比，多尺度线性注意力在局部信息提取方面能力有限。

limits.en: Performance on single-point prompt segmentation in LVIS is inferior to SAM-ViT-H, requiring further investigation.
limits.zh: 在LVIS单点提示分割上性能不如SAM-ViT-H，需进一步研究。

limits.en: Models are evaluated only on specific tasks (semantic segmentation, super-resolution, Segment Anything) and datasets.
limits.zh: 模型仅在特定任务（语义分割、超分辨率、Segment Anything）和数据集上评估。

limits.en: Training requires two-phase process for Segment Anything, adding complexity.
limits.zh: Segment Anything训练需两阶段流程，增加了复杂性。

limits.en: Effectiveness on other vision tasks like video or 3D processing is not explored.
limits.zh: 未探索在视频或3D处理等其他视觉任务上的有效性。

items.en: High-resolution dense prediction enables many appealing real-world applications, such as computational photography, autonomous driving, etc. However, the vast computational cost makes deploying state-of-the-art high-resolution dense prediction models on hardware devices difficult. This work presents EfficientViT, a new family of high-resolution vision models with novel multi-scale linear attention. Unlike prior high-resolution dense prediction models that rely on heavy softmax attention, hardware-inefficient large-kernel convolution, or complicated topology structure to obtain good performances, our multi-scale linear attention achieves the global receptive field and multi-scale learning (two desirable features for high-resolution dense prediction) with only lightweight and hardware-efficient operations. As such, EfficientViT delivers remarkable performance gains over previous state-of-the-art models with significant speedup on diverse hardware platforms, including mobile CPU, edge GPU, and cloud GPU. Without performance loss on Cityscapes, our EfficientViT provides up to 13.9×\times and 6.2×\times GPU latency reduction over SegFormer and SegNeXt, respectively. For super-resolution, EfficientViT delivers up to 6.4×\times speedup over Restormer while providing 0.11dB gain in PSNR. For Segment Anything, EfficientViT delivers 48.9×\times higher throughput on A100 GPU while achieving slightly better zero-shot instance segmentation performance on COCO.
items.zh: 高分辨率密集预测支持许多有吸引力的现实应用，例如计算摄影、自动驾驶等。然而，巨大的计算成本使得在硬件设备上部署最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型变得困难。本文提出了EfficientViT，一种新的高分辨率视觉模型家族，具有新颖的多尺度线性注意力机制。与之前依赖繁重的softmax注意力、硬件效率低的大核卷积或复杂拓扑结构来获得良好性能的高分辨率密集预测模型不同，我们的多尺度线性注意力仅使用轻量级且硬件高效的操作即可实现全局感受野和多尺度学习（高分辨率密集预测的两个理想特性）。因此，EfficientViT在多种硬件平台（包括移动CPU、边缘GPU和云端GPU）上相比之前的最先进模型实现了显著的性能提升和大幅加速。在Cityscapes上无性能损失的情况下，我们的EfficientViT相比SegFormer和SegNeXt分别提供了高达13.9倍和6.2倍的GPU延迟降低。对于超分辨率，EfficientViT相比Restormer提供了高达6.4倍的加速，同时PSNR提升了0.11dB。对于Segment Anything，EfficientViT在A100 GPU上提供了48.9倍的吞吐量提升，同时在COCO上实现了略优的零样本实例分割性能。

items.en: High-resolution dense prediction is a fundamental task in computer vision and has broad applications in the real world, including autonomous driving, medical image processing, computational photography, etc. Therefore, deploying state-of-the-art (SOTA) high-resolution dense prediction models on hardware devices can benefit many use cases.
items.zh: 高分辨率密集预测是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，在现实世界中具有广泛的应用，包括自动驾驶、医学图像处理、计算摄影等。因此，在硬件设备上部署最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型可以惠及许多用例。

items.en: However, there is a large gap between the computational cost required by SOTA high-resolution dense prediction models and the limited resources of hardware devices. It makes using these models in real-world applications impractical. In particular, high-resolution dense prediction models require high-resolution images and strong context information extraction ability to work well [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]. Therefore, directly porting efficient model architectures from image classification is unsuitable for high-resolution dense prediction.
items.zh: 然而，最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型所需的计算成本与硬件设备的有限资源之间存在巨大差距。这使得在现实应用中使用这些模型变得不切实际。特别是，高分辨率密集预测模型需要高分辨率图像和强大的上下文信息提取能力才能良好工作[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]。因此，直接移植来自图像分类的高效模型架构并不适合高分辨率密集预测。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Latency/Throughput vs. Performance. All performance results are obtained with the single model and single-scale inference. The GPU latency/throughput results are obtained on one edge GPU (Jetson AGX Orin) and one cloud GPU (A100) using TensorRT and fp16. EfficientViT consistently achieves a remarkable boost in speed on diverse hardware platforms while providing the same/higher performances on Cityscapes, ADE20K, and ImageNet than prior segmentation/classification models.
items.capZh: 图1：延迟/吞吐量与性能对比。所有性能结果均使用单一模型和单尺度推理获得。GPU延迟/吞吐量结果是在一个边缘GPU（Jetson AGX Orin）和一个云端GPU（A100）上使用TensorRT和fp16获得的。EfficientViT在多种硬件平台上持续实现显著的加速，同时在Cityscapes、ADE20K和ImageNet上提供与先前分割/分类模型相同或更高的性能。

items.en: This work introduces EfficientViT, a new family of vision transformer models for efficient high-resolution dense prediction. The core of EfficientViT is a new multi-scale linear attention module that enables the global receptive field and multi-scale learning with hardware-efficient operations. Our module is motivated by prior SOTA high-resolution dense prediction models. They demonstrate that the multi-scale learning [3, 4] and global receptive field [7] are critical in improving models’ performances. However, they do not consider hardware efficiency when designing their models, which is essential for real-world applications. For example, SegFormer [7] introduces softmax attention [8] into the backbone to have a global receptive field. However, its computational complexity is quadratic to the input resolution, making it unable to handle high-resolution images efficiently. SegNeXt [9] proposes a multi-branch module with large-kernel convolutions (kernel size up to 21) to enable a large receptive field and multi-scale learning. However, large-kernel convolution requires exceptional support on hardware to achieve good efficiency [10, 11], which is usually unavailable on hardware devices.
items.zh: 本文介绍了EfficientViT，一种用于高效高分辨率密集预测的新型视觉Transformer模型家族。EfficientViT的核心是一种新的多尺度线性注意力模块，它通过硬件高效的操作实现了全局感受野和多尺度学习。我们的模块受到先前最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型的启发。这些模型表明，多尺度学习[3, 4]和全局感受野[7]对于提高模型性能至关重要。然而，它们在设计模型时没有考虑硬件效率，而这对于现实应用至关重要。例如，SegFormer [7]在主干中引入了softmax注意力[8]以获得全局感受野。然而，其计算复杂度与输入分辨率呈二次关系，使其无法高效处理高分辨率图像。SegNeXt [9]提出了一种具有大核卷积（核大小可达21）的多分支模块，以实现大感受野和多尺度学习。然而，大核卷积需要硬件提供特殊支持才能实现良好效率[10, 11]，而这在硬件设备上通常不可用。

items.en: Hence, the design principle of our module is to enable these two critical features while avoiding hardware-inefficient operations. Specifically, we propose substituting the inefficient softmax attention with lightweight ReLU linear attention [12] to have the global receptive field. By leveraging the associative property of matrix multiplication, ReLU linear attention can reduce the computational complexity from quadratic to linear while preserving functionality. In addition, it avoids hardware-inefficient operations like softmax, making it more suitable for hardware deployment (Figure 4).
items.zh: 因此，我们模块的设计原则是在避免硬件低效操作的同时实现这两个关键特性。具体来说，我们建议用轻量级的ReLU线性注意力[12]替代低效的softmax注意力，以获得全局感受野。通过利用矩阵乘法的结合性质，ReLU线性注意力可以将计算复杂度从二次降低到线性，同时保持功能。此外，它避免了像softmax这样的硬件低效操作，使其更适合硬件部署（图4）。

items.en: However, ReLU linear attention alone has limited capacity due to the lack of local information extraction and multi-scale learning ability. Therefore, we propose to enhance ReLU linear attention with convolution and introduce the multi-scale linear attention module to address the capacity limitation of ReLU linear attention. Specifically, we aggregate nearby tokens with small-kernel convolutions to generate multi-scale tokens. We perform ReLU linear attention on multi-scale tokens (Figure 2) to combine the global receptive field with multi-scale learning. We also insert depthwise convolutions into FFN layers to further improve the local feature extraction capacity.
items.zh: 然而，由于缺乏局部信息提取和多尺度学习能力，单独的ReLU线性注意力容量有限。因此，我们提出用卷积增强ReLU线性注意力，并引入多尺度线性注意力模块来解决ReLU线性注意力的容量限制。具体来说，我们使用小核卷积聚合相邻标记以生成多尺度标记。我们对多尺度标记执行ReLU线性注意力（图2），以结合全局感受野和多尺度学习。我们还在FFN层中插入深度可分离卷积，以进一步提高局部特征提取能力。

items.en: We extensively evaluate EfficientViT on two popular high-resolution dense prediction tasks: semantic segmentation and super-resolution. EfficientViT provides significant performance boosts over prior SOTA high-resolution dense prediction models. More importantly, EfficientViT does not involve hardware-inefficient operations, so our #FLOPs reduction can easily translate to latency reduction on hardware devices (Figure 1).
items.zh: 我们在两个流行的高分辨率密集预测任务上广泛评估了EfficientViT：语义分割和超分辨率。EfficientViT相比先前最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型提供了显著的性能提升。更重要的是，EfficientViT不涉及硬件低效操作，因此我们的#FLOPs减少可以轻松转化为硬件设备上的延迟降低（图1）。

items.en: In addition to these conventional high-resolution dense prediction tasks, we apply EfficientViT to Segment Anything [13], an emerging promptable segmentation task that allows zero-shot transfer to many vision tasks. EfficientViT achieves 48.9×\times acceleration on A100 GPU than SAM-ViT-Huge [13] without performance loss. We summarize our contributions as follows:
items.zh: 除了这些传统的高分辨率密集预测任务外，我们将EfficientViT应用于Segment Anything [13]，这是一种新兴的可提示分割任务，允许零样本迁移到许多视觉任务。EfficientViT在A100 GPU上相比SAM-ViT-Huge [13]实现了48.9倍的加速，且无性能损失。我们将贡献总结如下：

items.en: We introduce a new multi-scale linear attention module for efficient high-resolution dense prediction. It achieves the global receptive field and multi-scale learning while maintaining good efficiency on hardware. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to demonstrate the effectiveness of linear attention for high-resolution dense prediction.
items.zh: 我们引入了一种新的多尺度线性注意力模块，用于高效的高分辨率密集预测。它在保持硬件良好效率的同时实现了全局感受野和多尺度学习。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个证明线性注意力在高分辨率密集预测中有效性的工作。

items.en: We design EfficientViT, a new family of high-resolution vision models, based on the proposed multi-scale linear attention module.
items.zh: 我们基于所提出的多尺度线性注意力模块设计了EfficientViT，一种新的高分辨率视觉模型家族。

items.en: Our model demonstrates remarkable speedup on semantic segmentation, super-resolution, Segment Anything, and ImageNet classification on diverse hardware platforms (mobile CPU, edge GPU, and cloud GPU) over prior SOTA models.
items.zh: 我们的模型在语义分割、超分辨率、Segment Anything和ImageNet分类等多种硬件平台（移动CPU、边缘GPU和云端GPU）上，相比先前最先进的模型展示了显著的加速。

items.capEn: Figure 2: EfficientViT’s Building Block (left) and Multi-Scale Linear Attention (right). Left: EfficientViT’s building block consists of a multi-scale linear attention module and an FFN with depthwise convolution (FFN+DWConv). Multi-scale linear attention is responsible for capturing context information, while FFN+DWConv captures local information. Right: After getting Q/K/V tokens via the linear projection layer, we generate multi-scale tokens by aggregating nearby tokens via lightweight small-kernel convolutions. ReLU linear attention is applied to multi-scale tokens, and the outputs are concatenated and fed to the final linear projection layer for feature fusing.
items.capZh: 图2：EfficientViT的构建块（左）和多尺度线性注意力（右）。左：EfficientViT的构建块由一个多尺度线性注意力模块和一个带深度可分离卷积的FFN（FFN+DWConv）组成。多尺度线性注意力负责捕获上下文信息，而FFN+DWConv捕获局部信息。右：通过线性投影层获得Q/K/V标记后，我们通过轻量级小核卷积聚合相邻标记来生成多尺度标记。对多尺度标记应用ReLU线性注意力，并将输出拼接起来馈送到最终的线性投影层进行特征融合。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Softmax Attention vs. ReLU Linear Attention. Unlike softmax attention, ReLU linear attention cannot produce sharp attention distributions due to a lack of the non-linear similarity function. Thus, its local information extraction ability is weaker than the softmax attention.
items.capZh: 图3：Softmax注意力与ReLU线性注意力。与softmax注意力不同，ReLU线性注意力由于缺乏非线性相似性函数，无法产生尖锐的注意力分布。因此，其局部信息提取能力弱于softmax注意力。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Latency Comparison Between Softmax Attention and ReLU Linear Attention. ReLU linear attention is 3.3-4.5×\times faster than softmax attention with similar computation, thanks to removing hardware-unfriendly operations (e.g., softmax). Latency is measured on the Qualcomm Snapdragon 855 CPU with TensorFlow-Lite, batch size 1, and fp32.
items.capZh: 图4：Softmax注意力与ReLU线性注意力的延迟比较。由于移除了硬件不友好的操作（如softmax），ReLU线性注意力在相似计算量下比softmax注意力快3.3-4.5倍。延迟在Qualcomm Snapdragon 855 CPU上使用TensorFlow-Lite测量，批大小为1，fp32。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Macro Architecture of EfficientViT. We adopt the standard backbone-head/encoder-decoder design. We insert our EfficientViT modules in Stages 3 and 4 in the backbone. Following the common practice, we feed the features from the last three stages (P2, P3, and P4) to the head. We use addition to fuse these features for simplicity and efficiency. We adopt a simple head design that consists of several MBConv blocks and output layers.
items.capZh: 图5：EfficientViT的宏观架构。我们采用标准的主干-头部/编码器-解码器设计。我们在主干的第3和第4阶段插入EfficientViT模块。按照常见做法，我们将最后三个阶段（P2、P3和P4）的特征馈送到头部。为了简单和高效，我们使用加法来融合这些特征。我们采用简单的头部设计，由几个MBConv块和输出层组成。

items.en: This section first introduces the multi-scale linear attention module. Unlike prior works, our multi-scale linear attention simultaneously achieves the global receptive field and multi-scale learning with only hardware-efficient operations. Then, based on the multi-scale linear attention, we present a new family of vision transformer models named EfficientViT for high-resolution dense prediction.
items.zh: 本节首先介绍多尺度线性注意力模块。与先前的工作不同，我们的多尺度线性注意力仅使用硬件高效操作同时实现了全局感受野和多尺度学习。然后，基于多尺度线性注意力，我们提出了一种名为EfficientViT的新型视觉Transformer模型家族，用于高分辨率密集预测。

items.en: Our multi-scale linear attention balances two crucial aspects of efficient high-resolution dense prediction, i.e., performance and efficiency. Specifically, the global receptive field and multi-scale learning are essential from the performance perspective. Previous SOTA high-resolution dense prediction models provide strong performances by enabling these features but fail to provide good efficiency. Our module tackles this issue by trading slight capacity loss for significant efficiency improvements.
items.zh: 我们的多尺度线性注意力平衡了高效高分辨率密集预测的两个关键方面，即性能和效率。具体来说，从性能角度来看，全局感受野和多尺度学习至关重要。先前最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型通过启用这些特性提供了强大的性能，但未能提供良好的效率。我们的模块通过牺牲少量容量来换取显著的效率提升，从而解决了这个问题。

items.en: An illustration of the proposed multi-scale linear attention module is provided in Figure 2 (right). In particular, we propose to use ReLU linear attention [12] to enable the global receptive field instead of the heavy softmax attention [8]. While ReLU linear attention [12] and other linear attention modules [14, 15, 16, 17] have been explored in other domains, it has never been successfully applied to high-resolution dense prediction. To the best of our knowledge, EfficientViT is the first work demonstrating ReLU linear attention’s effectiveness in high-resolution dense prediction. In addition, our work introduces novel designs to address its capacity limitation.
items.zh: 图2（右）提供了所提出的多尺度线性注意力模块的示意图。具体来说，我们建议使用ReLU线性注意力[12]来启用全局感受野，而不是繁重的softmax注意力[8]。虽然ReLU线性注意力[12]和其他线性注意力模块[14, 15, 16, 17]已在其他领域得到探索，但从未成功应用于高分辨率密集预测。据我们所知，EfficientViT是第一个证明ReLU线性注意力在高分辨率密集预测中有效性的工作。此外，我们的工作引入了新颖的设计来解决其容量限制。

items.en: Given input x∈ℝN×f𝑥superscriptℝ𝑁𝑓x\in\operatorname*{\mathbb{R}}^{N\times f}, the generalized form of softmax attention can be written as:
items.zh: 给定输入 x∈ℝ^{N×f}，softmax注意力的广义形式可以写为：

items.en: where Q=x​WQ𝑄𝑥subscript𝑊𝑄Q=xW_{Q}, K=x​WK𝐾𝑥subscript𝑊𝐾K=xW_{K}, V=x​WV𝑉𝑥subscript𝑊𝑉V=xW_{V} and WQ/WK/WV∈ℝf×dsubscript𝑊𝑄subscript𝑊𝐾subscript𝑊𝑉superscriptℝ𝑓𝑑W_{Q}/W_{K}/W_{V}\in\operatorname*{\mathbb{R}}^{f\times d} is the learnable linear projection matrix. Oisubscript𝑂𝑖O_{i} represents the i-th row of matrix O𝑂O. S​i​m​(⋅,⋅)𝑆𝑖𝑚⋅⋅Sim(\cdot,\cdot) is the similarity function. When using the similarity function S​i​m​(Q,K)=exp⁡(Q​KTd)𝑆𝑖𝑚𝑄𝐾𝑄superscript𝐾𝑇𝑑Sim(Q,K)=\exp(\frac{QK^{T}}{\sqrt{d}}), Eq. (1) becomes the original softmax attention [8].
items.zh: 其中 Q=xW_Q，K=xW_K，V=xW_V，W_Q/W_K/W_V∈ℝ^{f×d} 是可学习的线性投影矩阵。O_i 表示矩阵 O 的第 i 行。Sim(·,·) 是相似度函数。当使用相似度函数 Sim(Q,K)=exp(QK^T/√d) 时，公式 (1) 变为原始的 softmax 注意力 [8]。

items.en: Apart from exp⁡(Q​KTd)𝑄superscript𝐾𝑇𝑑\exp(\frac{QK^{T}}{\sqrt{d}}), we can use other similarity functions. In this work, we use ReLU linear attention [12] to achieve both the global receptive field and linear computational complexity. In ReLU linear attention, the similarity function is defined as
items.zh: 除了 exp(QK^T/√d)，我们还可以使用其他相似度函数。在本工作中，我们使用 ReLU 线性注意力 [12] 来实现全局感受野和线性计算复杂度。在 ReLU 线性注意力中，相似度函数定义为

items.en: With S​i​m​(Q,K)=ReLU​(Q)​ReLU​(K)T𝑆𝑖𝑚𝑄𝐾ReLU𝑄ReLUsuperscript𝐾𝑇Sim(Q,K)=\text{ReLU}(Q)\text{ReLU}(K)^{T}, Eq. (1) can be rewritten as:
items.zh: 使用 Sim(Q,K)=ReLU(Q)ReLU(K)^T，公式 (1) 可以重写为：

items.en: Then, we can leverage the associative property of matrix multiplication to reduce the computational complexity and memory footprint from quadratic to linear without changing its functionality:
items.zh: 然后，我们可以利用矩阵乘法的结合律，在不改变功能的情况下，将计算复杂度和内存占用从二次降低到线性：

items.en: As shown in Eq. (2.1), we only need to compute (∑j=1NReLU​(Kj)T​Vj)superscriptsubscript𝑗1𝑁ReLUsuperscriptsubscript𝐾𝑗𝑇subscript𝑉𝑗(\sum_{j=1}^{N}\text{ReLU}(K_{j})^{T}V_{j}) ∈ℝd×dabsentsuperscriptℝ𝑑𝑑\in\operatorname*{\mathbb{R}}^{d\times d} and (∑j=1NReLU​(Kj)T)superscriptsubscript𝑗1𝑁ReLUsuperscriptsubscript𝐾𝑗𝑇(\sum_{j=1}^{N}\text{ReLU}(K_{j})^{T}) ∈ℝd×1absentsuperscriptℝ𝑑1\in\operatorname*{\mathbb{R}}^{d\times 1} once, then can reuse them for each query, thereby only requires 𝒪​(N)𝒪𝑁\mathcal{O}(N) computational cost and 𝒪​(N)𝒪𝑁\mathcal{O}(N) memory.
items.zh: 如公式 (2.1) 所示，我们只需要计算一次 (∑_{j=1}^N ReLU(K_j)^T V_j) ∈ ℝ^{d×d} 和 (∑_{j=1}^N ReLU(K_j)^T) ∈ ℝ^{d×1}，然后可以为每个查询重复使用它们，因此只需要 𝒪(N) 的计算成本和 𝒪(N) 的内存。

items.en: Another key merit of ReLU linear attention is that it does not involve hardware-unfriendly operations like softmax, making it more efficient on hardware. For example, Figure 4 shows the latency comparison between softmax attention and ReLU linear attention. With similar computation, ReLU linear attention is significantly faster than softmax attention on the mobile CPU.
items.zh: ReLU 线性注意力的另一个关键优点是它不涉及像 softmax 这样对硬件不友好的操作，使其在硬件上更高效。例如，图 4 显示了 softmax 注意力和 ReLU 线性注意力之间的延迟比较。在相似的计算量下，ReLU 线性注意力在移动 CPU 上明显快于 softmax 注意力。

items.en: Although ReLU linear attention is superior to softmax attention in terms of computational complexity and hardware latency, ReLU linear attention has limitations. Figure 3 visualizes the attention maps of softmax attention and ReLU linear attention. Because of the lack of the non-linear similarity function, ReLU linear attention cannot generate concentrated attention maps, making it weak at capturing local information.
items.zh: 尽管 ReLU 线性注意力在计算复杂度和硬件延迟方面优于 softmax 注意力，但它也有局限性。图 3 可视化了 softmax 注意力和 ReLU 线性注意力的注意力图。由于缺乏非线性相似度函数，ReLU 线性注意力无法生成集中的注意力图，使其在捕捉局部信息方面较弱。

items.en: To mitigate its limitation, we propose to enhance ReLU linear attention with convolution. Specifically, we insert a depthwise convolution in each FFN layer. An overview of the resulting building block is illustrated in Figure 2 (left), where the ReLU linear attention captures context information and the FFN+DWConv captures local information.
items.zh: 为了缓解其局限性，我们提出用卷积增强 ReLU 线性注意力。具体来说，我们在每个 FFN 层中插入一个深度可分离卷积。图 2（左）展示了由此产生的构建块的概览，其中 ReLU 线性注意力捕捉上下文信息，FFN+DWConv 捕捉局部信息。

items.en: Furthermore, we propose to aggregate the information from nearby Q/K/V tokens to get multi-scale tokens to enhance the multi-scale learning ability of ReLU linear attention. This information aggregation process is independent for each Q, K, and V in each head. We only use small-kernel depthwise-separable convolutions [18] for information aggregation to avoid hurting hardware efficiency. In the practical implementation, independently executing these aggregation operations is inefficient on GPU. Therefore, we take advantage of the group convolution to reduce the number of total operations. Specifically, all DWConvs are fused into a single DWConv while all 1x1 Convs are combined into a single 1x1 group convolution (Figure 2 right) where the number of groups is 3×#heads3#heads3\times\text{\#heads} and the number of channels in each group is d. After getting multi-scale tokens, we perform ReLU linear attention upon them to extract multi-scale global features. Finally, we concatenate the features along the head dimension and feed them to the final linear projection layer to fuse the features.
items.zh: 此外，我们提出聚合附近 Q/K/V 令牌的信息以获得多尺度令牌，从而增强 ReLU 线性注意力的多尺度学习能力。这个信息聚合过程对每个头中的 Q、K 和 V 是独立的。我们只使用小核深度可分离卷积 [18] 进行信息聚合，以避免损害硬件效率。在实际实现中，独立执行这些聚合操作在 GPU 上效率低下。因此，我们利用分组卷积来减少总操作数。具体来说，所有 DWConv 融合为一个 DWConv，而所有 1x1 卷积合并为一个 1x1 分组卷积（图 2 右），其中组数为 3×#heads，每组通道数为 d。获得多尺度令牌后，我们对它们执行 ReLU 线性注意力以提取多尺度全局特征。最后，我们沿头维度连接特征，并将其输入到最终的线性投影层以融合特征。

items.en: We build a new family of vision transformer models based on the proposed multi-scale linear attention module. The core building block (denoted as ‘EfficientViT Module’) is illustrated in Figure 2 (left). The macro architecture of EfficientViT is demonstrated in Figure 5. We use the standard backbone-head/encoder-decoder architecture design.
items.zh: 我们基于提出的多尺度线性注意力模块构建了一个新的视觉 Transformer 模型系列。核心构建块（称为“EfficientViT 模块”）如图 2（左）所示。EfficientViT 的宏观架构如图 5 所示。我们使用标准的骨干-头部/编码器-解码器架构设计。

items.en: Backbone. The backbone of EfficientViT also follows the standard design, which consists of the input stem and four stages with gradually decreased feature map size and gradually increased channel number. We insert the EfficientViT module in Stages 3 and 4. For downsampling, we use an MBConv with stride 2.
items.zh: 骨干网络。EfficientViT 的骨干网络也遵循标准设计，包括输入 stem 和四个阶段，特征图大小逐渐减小，通道数逐渐增加。我们在阶段 3 和 4 中插入 EfficientViT 模块。对于下采样，我们使用步长为 2 的 MBConv。

items.en: Head. P2, P3, and P4 denote the outputs of Stages 2, 3, and 4, forming a pyramid of feature maps. For simplicity and efficiency, we use 1x1 convolution and standard upsampling operation (e.g., bilinear/bicubic upsampling) to match their spatial and channel size and fuse them via addition. Since our backbone already has a strong context information extraction capacity, we adopt a simple head design that comprises several MBConv blocks and the output layers (i.e., prediction and upsample). In the experiments, we empirically find this simple head design is sufficient for achieving SOTA performances.
items.zh: 头部。P2、P3 和 P4 分别表示阶段 2、3 和 4 的输出，形成特征图金字塔。为了简单和高效，我们使用 1x1 卷积和标准上采样操作（例如双线性/双三次上采样）来匹配它们的空间和通道大小，并通过加法融合它们。由于我们的骨干网络已经具有很强的上下文信息提取能力，我们采用了一个简单的头部设计，包括几个 MBConv 块和输出层（即预测和上采样）。在实验中，我们经验性地发现这种简单的头部设计足以实现 SOTA 性能。

items.en: In addition to dense prediction, our model can be applied to other vision tasks, such as image classification, by combining the backbone with task-specific heads.
items.zh: 除了密集预测，我们的模型还可以应用于其他视觉任务，例如图像分类，通过将骨干网络与任务特定的头部结合。

items.en: Following the same macro architecture, we design a series of models with different sizes to satisfy various efficiency constraints. We name these models EfficientViT-B0, EfficientViT-B1, EfficientViT-B2, and EfficientViT-B3, respectively. In addition, we designed the EfficientViT-L series for the cloud platforms. Detailed configurations of these models are provided in our official GitHub repository111https://github.com/mit-han-lab/efficientvit.
items.zh: 遵循相同的宏观架构，我们设计了一系列不同大小的模型以满足各种效率约束。我们将这些模型分别命名为 EfficientViT-B0、EfficientViT-B1、EfficientViT-B2 和 EfficientViT-B3。此外，我们为云平台设计了 EfficientViT-L 系列。这些模型的详细配置在我们的官方 GitHub 仓库中提供。

items.en: We evaluate the effectiveness of EfficientViT on three representative high-resolution dense prediction tasks, including semantic segmentation, super-resolution, and Segment Anything.
items.zh: 我们在三个具有代表性的高分辨率密集预测任务上评估了 EfficientViT 的有效性，包括语义分割、超分辨率和 Segment Anything。

items.en: For semantic segmentation, we use two popular benchmark datasets: Cityscapes [24] and ADE20K [25]. In addition, we evaluate EfficientViT under two settings for super-resolution: lightweight super-resolution (SR) and high-resolution SR. We train models on DIV2K [26] for lightweight SR and test on BSD100 [27]. For high-resolution SR, we train models on the first 3000 training images of FFHQ [28] and test on the first 500 validation images of FFHQ222https://rb.gy/7je1a.
items.zh: 对于语义分割，我们使用两个流行的基准数据集：Cityscapes [24] 和 ADE20K [25]。此外，我们在两种设置下评估 EfficientViT 的超分辨率性能：轻量级超分辨率（SR）和高分辨率 SR。我们在 DIV2K [26] 上训练轻量级 SR 模型，并在 BSD100 [27] 上测试。对于高分辨率 SR，我们在 FFHQ [28] 的前 3000 张训练图像上训练模型，并在 FFHQ 的前 500 张验证图像上测试。

items.en: Apart from dense prediction, we also study the effectiveness of EfficientViT for image classification using the ImageNet dataset [29].
items.zh: 除了密集预测，我们还使用 ImageNet 数据集 [29] 研究了 EfficientViT 在图像分类上的有效性。

items.en: We measure the mobile latency on Qualcomm Snapdragon 8Gen1 CPU with Tensorflow-Lite333https://www.tensorflow.org/lite, batch size 1 and fp32. We use TensorRT444https://docs.nvidia.com/deeplearning/tensorrt/ and fp16 to measure the latency on edge GPU and cloud GPU. The data transfer time is included in the reported latency/throughput results.
items.zh: 我们在 Qualcomm Snapdragon 8Gen1 CPU 上使用 Tensorflow-Lite 测量移动延迟，批大小为 1，fp32。我们使用 TensorRT 和 fp16 测量边缘 GPU 和云 GPU 上的延迟。数据转移时间包含在报告的延迟/吞吐量结果中。

items.en: We implement our models using Pytorch [30] and train them on GPUs. We use the AdamW optimizer with cosine learning rate decay for training our models. For multi-scale linear attention, we use a two-branch design for the best trade-off between performance and efficiency, where 5x5 nearby tokens are aggregated to generate multi-scale tokens.
items.zh: 我们使用 Pytorch [30] 实现模型并在 GPU 上训练。我们使用 AdamW 优化器和余弦学习率衰减来训练模型。对于多尺度线性注意力，我们使用双分支设计以实现性能和效率的最佳权衡，其中聚合 5x5 邻近令牌以生成多尺度令牌。

items.en: For semantic segmentation experiments, we use the mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) as our evaluation metric. The backbone is initialized with weights pretrained on ImageNet and the head is initialized randomly, following the common practice.
items.zh: 对于语义分割实验，我们使用平均交并比（mIoU）作为评估指标。骨干网络使用在 ImageNet 上预训练的权重初始化，头部随机初始化，遵循常见做法。

items.en: For super-resolution, we use PSNR and SSIM on the Y channel as the evaluation metrics, same as previous work [31]. The models are trained with random initialization.
items.zh: 对于超分辨率，我们使用Y通道上的PSNR和SSIM作为评估指标，与先前工作[31]一致。模型采用随机初始化进行训练。

items.en: We conduct ablation study experiments on Cityscapes to study the effectiveness of two key design components of our EfficientViT module, i.e., multi-scale learning and global attention. To eliminate the impact of pre-training, we train all models from random initialization. In addition, we rescale the width of the models so that they have the same #MACs. The results are summarized in Table 1. We can see that removing either global attention or multi-scale learning will significantly hurt the performances. It shows that all of them are essential for achieving a better trade-off between performance and efficiency.
items.zh: 我们在Cityscapes上进行消融实验，以研究EfficientViT模块两个关键设计组件（即多尺度学习和全局注意力）的有效性。为消除预训练的影响，所有模型均从随机初始化开始训练。此外，我们重新调整模型宽度，使其具有相同的#MACs。结果总结于表1。可以看出，移除全局注意力或多尺度学习中的任何一个都会显著损害性能。这表明它们对于实现性能与效率之间的更好权衡都是必不可少的。

items.en: To understand the effectiveness of EfficientViT’s backbone in image classification, we train our models on ImageNet following the standard training strategy. We summarize the results and compare our models with SOTA image classification models in Table 2.
items.zh: 为了理解EfficientViT骨干网络在图像分类中的有效性，我们按照标准训练策略在ImageNet上训练模型。我们将结果总结于表2，并与SOTA图像分类模型进行比较。

items.en: Though EfficientViT is designed for high-resolution dense prediction, it achieves highly competitive performances on ImageNet classification. In particular, EfficientViT-L2-r384 obtains 86.0 top1 accuracy on ImageNet, providing +0.3 accuracy gain over EfficientNetV2-L and 2.6x speedup on A100 GPU.
items.zh: 尽管EfficientViT专为高分辨率密集预测设计，但在ImageNet分类上取得了极具竞争力的性能。特别是，EfficientViT-L2-r384在ImageNet上达到86.0的top1准确率，相比EfficientNetV2-L提升0.3个准确率点，并在A100 GPU上实现2.6倍加速。

items.en: In addition to the quantitative results, we visualize EfficientViT and the baseline models qualitatively on Cityscapes. The results are shown in Figure 6. We can find that EfficientViT can better recognize boundaries and small objects than the baseline models while achieving lower latency on GPU.
items.zh: 除定量结果外，我们在Cityscapes上对EfficientViT和基线模型进行了定性可视化。结果如图6所示。我们发现，EfficientViT能比基线模型更好地识别边界和小物体，同时在GPU上实现更低的延迟。

items.en: On lightweight SR, EfficientViT provides up to 0.09dB gain in PSNR on BSD100 while maintaining the same or lower GPU latency compared with SOTA CNN-based SR methods. Compared with SOTA ViT-based SR methods, EfficientViT provides up to 5.4×\times speedup on GPU and maintains the same PSNR on BSD100.
items.zh: 在轻量级超分辨率方面，EfficientViT在BSD100上提供高达0.09dB的PSNR增益，同时与基于CNN的SOTA超分辨率方法相比保持相同或更低的GPU延迟。与基于ViT的SOTA超分辨率方法相比，EfficientViT在GPU上提供高达5.4倍的加速，并在BSD100上保持相同的PSNR。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Throughput vs. COCO Zero-Shot Instance Segmentation mAP. EfficientViT-SAM is the first accelerated SAM model that matches/outperforms SAM-ViT-H’s [13] zero-shot performance, delivering the SOTA performance-efficiency trade-off.
items.capZh: 图7：吞吐量 vs. COCO零样本实例分割mAP。EfficientViT-SAM是首个匹配/超越SAM-ViT-H[13]零样本性能的加速SAM模型，实现了SOTA性能-效率权衡。

items.en: On high-resolution SR, the advantage of EfficientViT over previous ViT-based SR methods becomes more significant. Compared with Restormer, EfficientViT achieves up to 6.4×\times speedup on GPU and provides 0.11dB gain in PSNR on FFHQ.
items.zh: 在高分辨率超分辨率方面，EfficientViT相对于先前基于ViT的超分辨率方法的优势更加显著。与Restormer相比，EfficientViT在GPU上实现高达6.4倍的加速，并在FFHQ上提供0.11dB的PSNR增益。

items.en: We build EfficientViT-SAM, a new family of accelerated segment anything models, by leveraging EfficientViT to replace SAM’s image encoder. Meanwhile, we retain SAM’s lightweight prompt encoder and mask decoder. The training process consists of two phases. First, we train the image encoder of EfficientViT-SAM using SAM’s image encoder as the teacher. Second, we train EfficientViT-SAM end-to-end using the whole SA-1B dataset [13].
items.zh: 我们构建了EfficientViT-SAM，这是一个新的加速分割一切模型系列，通过利用EfficientViT替换SAM的图像编码器。同时，我们保留了SAM的轻量级提示编码器和掩码解码器。训练过程包括两个阶段。首先，我们使用SAM的图像编码器作为教师，训练EfficientViT-SAM的图像编码器。其次，我们使用整个SA-1B数据集[13]端到端训练EfficientViT-SAM。

items.en: We thoroughly test EfficientViT-SAM on various zero-shot benchmarks to verify its effectiveness. Table 6 demonstrates the zero-shot instance segmentation results on COCO [38] and LVIS [39], prompted with the predicted bounding boxes from ViTDet [40]. EfficientViT-SAM provides superior performance/efficiency compared with SAM-ViT-H [13]. In particular, EfficientViT-SAM-XL1 outperforms SAM-ViT-H on COCO and LVIS while having 16.5×\times higher throughput on A100 GPU.
items.zh: 我们在各种零样本基准上全面测试EfficientViT-SAM以验证其有效性。表6展示了在COCO[38]和LVIS[39]上的零样本实例分割结果，使用来自ViTDet[40]的预测边界框作为提示。EfficientViT-SAM相比SAM-ViT-H[13]提供了优越的性能/效率。特别是，EfficientViT-SAM-XL1在COCO和LVIS上优于SAM-ViT-H，同时在A100 GPU上具有16.5倍的更高吞吐量。

items.en: Apart from box-prompted instance segmentation, we also evaluate EfficientViT-SAM on point-prompted segmentation. The results are summarized in Table 7. EfficientViT-SAM-XL1 outperforms SAM-ViT-H in most cases, especially when more points are given. On LVIS, when given a single point, we find SAM-ViT-H performs better than EfficientViT-SAM-XL1. This might be because we do not have the interactive segmentation setup during the end-to-end training phase. Further investigation is needed to improve the performance of the single-point setting.
items.zh: 除了框提示的实例分割，我们还评估了EfficientViT-SAM在点提示分割上的表现。结果总结于表7。EfficientViT-SAM-XL1在大多数情况下优于SAM-ViT-H，尤其是在给定更多点时。在LVIS上，当给定单个点时，我们发现SAM-ViT-H表现优于EfficientViT-SAM-XL1。这可能是因为我们在端到端训练阶段没有设置交互式分割。需要进一步研究以改进单点设置下的性能。

items.en: Dense prediction targets producing predictions for each pixel given the input image. It can be viewed as an extension of image classification from per-image prediction to per-pixel predictions. Extensive studies have been done to improve the performance of CNN-based high-resolution dense prediction models [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].
items.zh: 密集预测的目标是根据输入图像为每个像素生成预测。它可以被视为图像分类从每图像预测到每像素预测的扩展。已有大量研究致力于提高基于CNN的高分辨率密集预测模型的性能[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]。

items.en: In addition, there are also some works targeting improving the efficiency of high-resolution dense prediction models [41, 42, 43, 44]. While these models provide good efficiency, their performances are far behind SOTA high-resolution dense prediction models.
items.zh: 此外，也有一些工作旨在提高高分辨率密集预测模型的效率[41, 42, 43, 44]。虽然这些模型提供了良好的效率，但其性能远落后于SOTA高分辨率密集预测模型。

items.en: Compared to these works, our models provide a better trade-off between performance and efficiency by enabling a global receptive field and multi-scale learning with lightweight operations.
items.zh: 与这些工作相比，我们的模型通过使用轻量级操作实现全局感受野和多尺度学习，在性能和效率之间提供了更好的权衡。

items.en: While ViT provides impressive performances in the high-computation region, it is usually inferior to previous efficient CNNs [45, 46, 47, 48] when targeting the low-computation region. To close the gap, MobileViT [49] proposes to combine the strength of CNN and ViT by replacing local processing in convolutions with global processing using transformers. MobileFormer [50] proposes to parallelize MobileNet and Transformer with a two-way bridge in between for feature fusing. NASViT [51] proposes to leverage neural architecture search to search for efficient ViT architectures.
items.zh: 虽然ViT在高计算区域表现出色，但在低计算区域通常不如先前的高效CNN[45, 46, 47, 48]。为缩小差距，MobileViT[49]提出通过用Transformer的全局处理替换卷积中的局部处理来结合CNN和ViT的优势。MobileFormer[50]提出将MobileNet和Transformer并行化，并在两者之间设置双向桥接以进行特征融合。NASViT[51]提出利用神经架构搜索来搜索高效的ViT架构。

items.en: However, these models mainly focus on image classification and still rely on softmax attention with quadratic computational complexity, thus unsuitable for high-resolution dense prediction.
items.zh: 然而，这些模型主要关注图像分类，并且仍然依赖于具有二次计算复杂度的softmax注意力，因此不适合高分辨率密集预测。

items.en: Our work is also related to efficient deep learning, which aims at improving the efficiency of deep neural networks so that we can deploy them on hardware platforms with limited resources, such as mobile phones and IoT devices. Typical technologies in efficient deep learning include network pruning [52, 53, 54], quantization [55], efficient model architecture design [18, 56], and training techniques [57, 58, 59]. In addition to manual designs, many recent works use AutoML techniques [60, 61, 62] to automatically design [47], prune [63] and quantize [64] neural networks.
items.zh: 我们的工作也与高效深度学习相关，后者旨在提高深度神经网络的效率，以便将其部署在资源受限的硬件平台上，如手机和物联网设备。高效深度学习的典型技术包括网络剪枝[52, 53, 54]、量化[55]、高效模型架构设计[18, 56]和训练技术[57, 58, 59]。除了手动设计，许多近期工作使用AutoML技术[60, 61, 62]来自动设计[47]、剪枝[63]和量化[64]神经网络。

items.en: In this work, we studied efficient architecture design for high-resolution dense prediction. We introduced a lightweight multi-scale attention module that simultaneously achieves a global receptive field, and multi-scale learning with lightweight and hardware-efficient operations, thus providing significant speedup on diverse hardware devices without performance loss than SOTA high-resolution dense prediction models. For future work, we will explore applying EfficientViT to other vision tasks and further scaling up our EfficientViT models.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了高分辨率密集预测的高效架构设计。我们引入了一个轻量级多尺度注意力模块，该模块同时实现了全局感受野和多尺度学习，并采用轻量级且硬件高效的操作，从而在多种硬件设备上相比SOTA高分辨率密集预测模型实现了显著加速且无性能损失。未来工作将探索将EfficientViT应用于其他视觉任务，并进一步扩展我们的EfficientViT模型。

items.en: We thank MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab, MIT AI Hardware Program, Amazon and MIT Science Hub, Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship, National Science Foundation for supporting this research.
items.zh: 我们感谢MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab、MIT AI Hardware Program、Amazon和MIT Science Hub、Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship、National Science Foundation对本研究的支持。
